name: Noble Knight Joan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジャンヌ
desc: If this card attacks, it loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: If this card attacks, it loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.
eff: If this card attacks, it loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
